scripts.build: cross-env GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -tags lambda.norpc -o bin/bootstrap main.go && node scripts/build-zip.js
scripts.deploy:dev: npm run build && npx serverless deploy --stage dev
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run build && npx serverless deploy --stage prod
scripts.setup: go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/goimports@latest && go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest && git config core.hooksPath .githooks
scripts.check: npm run fmt && npm run lint
